prompt: Create a high-fashion magazine cover photo of a glamorous beach cosplay portrait inspired by Raiden Shogun from Genshin Impact. A single adult woman sits on a large dark seaside rock in a three-quarter front pose, one hand resting behind her on the rock and the other relaxed near her side, with one thigh raised prominently toward the camera. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor centered over the face. She has very long, rich violet-purple hair with magenta highlights, styled with a thick braid draped over one shoulder and loose windswept strands flowing to the right, decorated with blue flower hair ornaments and gold accessories near one side of the head. She wears an elegant lavender, lilac, and deep purple Raiden Shogun-style cosplay outfit: a low-cut kimono-inspired bodice, translucent flowing sleeves, layered sash and obi with ornate circular gold-and-purple emblem at the waist, a jeweled choker with a purple gem, dangling blue-and-gold earrings, a black armored-looking forearm piece, and sheer purple thigh-high stockings with garter straps and decorative patterns. The lighting is natural golden beach daylight with soft highlights on skin and fabric, shallow depth of field, and a luxurious editorial look. The background is a softly blurred shoreline with pale sand, shimmering water, sea mist, and a distant rocky island or cliff. Compose it as a full magazine cover with elegant fashion typography in dark royal purple. The masthead is huge across the top reading COSPLAY, with small top-left text "COSPLAY REALM MAGAZINE" and small top-right text "JANUARY 2024". Add left-side cover lines: "RAIDEN SHOGUN", "COSPLAY BY SAKURA", "BEHIND THE SCENES AT THE BEACH", and "EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW" followed by smaller text "Sakura talks about her love for Genshin Impact". Add right-side cover lines: "GENSHIN IMPACT" with smaller text "SPECIAL EDITION", and at lower right "TOP COSER OF 2024" with smaller text "Sakura’s rise to stardom". Place a realistic barcode with small pricing text in the bottom-left corner. Overall style: ultra-realistic cosplay photography, glossy magazine cover design, cinematic, sensual but tasteful, premium fashion editorial, high detail fabrics and accessories, sharp subject with softly blurred ocean background.
